objective: Collect the most valuable sushi cards and complete sushi sets. The player with the highest score at the end wins.

steps: Deal one card to each player.
Place six face-up cards in a row to form the sushi conveyor belt.
Put the remaining cards face-down in a deck at one end of the conveyor belt.
Keep a trash pile for used and discarded cards.

zones.deck: Face-down stack of cards to draw from.
zones.conveyor_belt: Six face-up cards in a row.
zones.trash: Pile of used and discarded cards.
zones.player_hands: Cards held by players. A player's hand is visible only to that player.
zones.in_front_of_player: Persistent played cards such as Matcha.

deck_lifecycle.reshuffle_rule: If the deck runs out and remaining playthroughs are available, shuffle the trash pile to form a new deck before the next draw.
deck_lifecycle.end_when_no_draw_possible: If no reshuffles remain and a player would draw a card but cannot, the game immediately ends.
deck_lifecycle.action_draws: If an action requires drawing cards and the deck runs out, reshuffle first if reshuffles remain. The action must be completed as far as possible under the draw rules.

hand_size.discard_timing: At the end of your turn, if you have more cards than your maximum hand size, discard down to that maximum.
hand_size.discard_restriction: When discarding, choose cards other than Ginger.
hand_size.increase_rule: Each Matcha card played in front of you increases your maximum hand size by one.
hand_size.formula: 8 + number of Matcha cards in front of you

turn_sequence.name: Draw a Card
turn_sequence.rule: Draw one card from the deck.

turn_sequence.name: Optional Action Card
turn_sequence.rule: If you have an action card, you may play one before exchanging with the conveyor belt. Most played action cards go to the trash, with exceptions such as Shoyu and Matcha.

turn_sequence.name: Exchange a Card
turn_sequence.rule: Exchange one card from your hand with any card on the conveyor belt.
restrictions: You cannot exchange two identical cards.
You cannot exchange Ginger this way unless Ginger is your only card and you had zero cards before drawing it this turn.

turn_sequence.name: Optional Action Card
turn_sequence.rule: If you did not already play an action card this turn, you may play one after the exchange, including an action card just picked up from the conveyor belt.

turn_sequence.name: Move the Conveyor Belt
turn_sequence.rule: Add a new card to the conveyor belt, move all cards on the belt one spot to the right, and put the card that falls off the end into the trash.

action_card_limit.timing: An action card may be played either before or after exchanging a card with the conveyor belt.

sushi_cards.rarity_rule: The higher the price, the rarer the sushi card.

card_fields.name: set_indicators
card_fields.description: Labels in the top-right corner indicate which set or sets the sushi belongs to. A sushi that belongs to two sets has two colored labels.

sushi_cards.set_membership_rule: Most sushi cards belong to one or two sets. Some rare and expensive sushi cards do not belong to any set.

action_cards.name: Ginger
action_cards.effect: No special ability. It occupies space in your hand.
restrictions: Cannot be exchanged for any card on the conveyor belt, except when the player had zero cards, drew Ginger, and must exchange.
Cannot be discarded, even if it is your only card.

action_cards.name: Sake
action_cards.effect: Choose an eligible opponent and draw one random card from their hand without looking. Then choose a card from your own hand; that opponent must draw that card.
target_restrictions: Cannot target a player with check protection.
Cannot target a player with zero cards.

action_cards.name: Umeshu
action_cards.effect: Choose an eligible opponent. Combine both players' hands into one pile and shuffle it. Starting with you, alternate drawing from the pile until it is empty.
target_restrictions: Cannot target a player with check protection.
Cannot target a player with zero cards.

action_cards.name: Chef's Choice
action_cards.effect: Draw three cards from the deck. Then choose any two cards from your hand, including cards just drawn, and place them back into the deck in any positions.
action_cards.draw_rule: If the deck runs out during the draw and reshuffles remain, reshuffle the trash into a new deck before continuing the draw.
action_cards.after_effect: Discard Chef's Choice into the trash.

action_cards.name: Wasabi
action_cards.effect: When you draw Wasabi, you must skip your next turn.
action_cards.stacking_rule: The effect stacks if you acquire multiple Wasabi cards in a single turn.
action_cards.final_turn_rule: If Wasabi makes you skip your final turn after check has been called, that final turn is consumed.

action_cards.name: Matcha
action_cards.effect: Draw one card and place Matcha in front of you.
action_cards.draw_rule: If the deck is empty and reshuffles remain, reshuffle before drawing.
action_cards.persistent_effect: Increase your maximum hand size by one for each Matcha card in front of you.
action_cards.after_effect: Matcha remains in front of you instead of going to the trash.

action_cards.name: Chopsticks
action_cards.effect: Choose an eligible opponent and draw one random card from their hand.
target_restrictions: Cannot target a player with check protection.
Cannot target a player with zero cards.

action_cards.name: Fork
action_cards.effect: All other players except any player with check protection must discard their most expensive sushi card.
action_cards.tie_rule: If an affected player has multiple most expensive sushi cards tied in price, that player chooses which tied card to discard.
action_cards.after_effect: Discard Fork into the trash. Discarded sushi cards are placed in the trash pile.

action_cards.name: Shoyu
action_cards.effect: Keep Shoyu in your hand until the end of the game.
action_cards.scoring_effect: At scoring, double the value of your most expensive sushi card that is not part of a completed set.
action_cards.tie_rule: If multiple eligible sushi cards tie for most expensive, the owner chooses which one each Shoyu applies to.
restrictions: Only one Shoyu may be applied per sushi card.
If you have multiple Shoyu cards, each must be applied to a different eligible sushi card.
Shoyu has no effect if all of your sushi cards are part of scored sets.

conditions.name: No Draw Possible
conditions.rule: After the allowed number of full deck playthroughs has been exhausted, the game immediately ends when a player would draw a card but cannot.

conditions.name: Check Called
conditions.rule: When a player completes a sushi set during their own turn, that player may call the check as they conclude their turn. After the check is called, each other player gets one final turn.

check_timing: Only a set completed during your own turn can trigger check.
You must complete all mandatory actions of your turn before calling check.
You may still play the optional post-exchange action card before calling check, if you have not already played an action card this turn.

check_protection.rule: Once a player calls the check, they cannot be affected by action cards from other players.
check_protection.targeting: Action cards that target a player cannot target the player with check protection.
check_protection.fork_interaction: Fork can still be played, but it does not affect the player with check protection.

scoring.general_rule: Add up the value of sushi cards and completed sets. The highest total wins.
scoring.tie_rule: If players tie on score, they tie; there is no winner among tied players.
scoring.duplicate_rule: Multiple copies of the same sushi card each count separately unless they are being counted as part of a completed set.

sets.completed_set_rule: When you have a completed sushi set, do not add the prices of the individual sushi cards in that set. Count only the value of the set as a whole.
sets.multiple_sets_rule: If you complete multiple non-overlapping sets, you may count all completed sets.
sets.duplicate_sets_rule: If you have enough duplicate sushi cards to complete the same named set more than once, you may score that set more than once.
sets.overlap_rule: If two possible completed sets require the same sushi card, choose which set uses that card; the same physical card cannot count toward both sets.
sets.extra_sushi_rule: Sushi cards not included in a scored set are added at their individual prices.

action_cards.default_rule: Most action cards have no price and do not count toward the score.
action_cards.shoyu_exception: Shoyu is the only action card that affects hand value by doubling eligible sushi cards.

items.name: Karaage
items.effect: Shoyu doubles one Karaage from 500 yen to 1000 yen.

items.name: Assorted Sashimi
items.effect: One Shoyu doubles one Assorted Sashimi from 1500 yen to 3000 yen.

items.name: Eel
items.effect: One Shoyu doubles one Eel from 700 yen to 1400 yen.

items.name: Shoyu
items.effect: No eligible sushi card remains outside the set, so Shoyu adds no value.

corner_cases.ginger_only_after_zero_card_draw: If a player has zero cards, draws Ginger, and must exchange a card, they may exchange Ginger. This is the only case where Ginger can be exchanged through the normal exchange step.
corner_cases.protected_player_targeting: A player with check protection cannot be targeted by player-targeting action cards.
corner_cases.zero_card_targeting: A player with zero cards cannot be chosen for Sake, Umeshu, or Chopsticks.
corner_cases.wasabi_final_turn: A final turn skipped by Wasabi is still consumed.
corner_cases.most_expensive_ties: When an effect requires choosing among tied most expensive sushi cards, the owner of those cards chooses.
